zh.lifeSummary: 當Annis Pope於1532年12月13日出生在英國素可武費爾德時，她的父親Edmond Pope36歲，母親Elizabeth Newdegate25歲。她於1548年與Francis Littlefield在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1638年在英國英格蘭哈普爾鐵費爾德享年106歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾鐵費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annis Pope于1532年12月13日出生在英国素可武費爾德时，她的父亲Edmond Pope36岁，母亲Elizabeth Newdegate25岁。她于1548年与Francis Littlefield在英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1638年在英国英格兰哈普爾鐵費爾德享年106岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾鐵費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Pope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pope (derived via Old English from Late Latin papa ‘bishop, pope’, from Greek pappas ‘father’, in origin a nursery word.) In the early Christian Church, the Latin term was at first used as a title of respect for male clergy of every rank, but in the Western Church it gradually came to be restricted to bishops, and then only to the bishop of Rome; in the Eastern Church it continued to be used of all priests (see Popov , Papas ). The nickname would have been used for a vain or pompous man, or for someone who had played the part of the pope in a pageant or play. The surname is also present in Ireland and Scotland.

variants.name: Popov
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Nikolay, Oleg, Grigoriy, Anatoly, Andrei, Arkadi, Dmitriy, Mikhail, Sergey.  Bulgarian or Macedonian Atanas, Dimitar, Yordan.  Serbian Bosko, Bozidar, Branko.

Russian, Bulgarian, Macedonian, Serbian, and Rusyn: patronymic from pop ‘priest’, from Greek pappas ‘father’ (compare English Pope ). The name may sometimes derive from a nickname, but celibacy was not enjoined on priests of the Orthodox Church and so the name can indeed mean ‘son of the priest’. In many cases, however, the Russian name means no more than ‘of the priest’ and designates a servant of a priest. Compare Popoff , see also Pop 2, Popovic , and Popovski 1.
Jewish (American): most likely a shortened form of   Popovski   2. Compare   Popoff  .

variants.name: Papke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Bernhard, Erwin, Hans, Otto, Willi.
North German (also Päpke): nickname from a diminutive of Low German pape, Dutch paepe ‘pope’. Compare Pope .

nameMeanings.name: Annis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

variants.name: Annice
meanings: Variant spelling of Annis , based on the numerous women's names ending in -ice.

variants.name: Annys
meanings: and English: a medieval vernacular form of   Agnes  , which gave rise to a surname. Its modern use as a given name is probably at least in part a transferred use of the surname as well as a revival of the medieval given name.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Annis Pope was born on 13 December 1532, in Uckfield, Sussex, England, her father, Edmond Pope, was 36 and her mother, Elizabeth Newdegate, was 25. She married Francis Littlefield in 1548, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1638, in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 106, and was buried in Titchfield, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annis Pope est née le 13 décembre 1532, à Uckfield, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Edmond Pope, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Newdegate, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Littlefield en 1548, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1638, à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 106 ans, et a été enterrée à Titchfield, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annis Pope am 13. Dezember 1532 in Uckfield, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmond Pope 36 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Newdegate 25. Sie hat 1548 in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Francis Littlefield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1638 im Alter von 106 Jahren in Titchfield, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Titchfield, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annis Pope è nata il il 13 dicembre 1532 nel Uckfield, Sussex, England, sua padre, Edmond Pope, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Newdegate, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Francis Littlefield nel 1548, nel Titchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1638, nel Titchfield, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 106 anni, e fu sepolta a Titchfield, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Annis Popeが1532年12月13日にイギリススセックスウクフィールドで生まれた時，父Edmond Popeは36歳，母Elizabeth Newdegateは25歳であった。1548年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドでFrancis Littlefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1638年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドで106歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアティトチフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Annis Pope(이)가 1532년 12월 13일 영국 수세스 ck필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmond Pope(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Newdegate(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1548년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 Francis Littlefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1638년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 티트ch필드에서 106세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 티트ch필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annis Pope nasceu em 13 de dezembro de 1532, em Uckfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmond Pope, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Newdegate, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Littlefield em 1548, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1638, em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 106 anos, e foi sepultada em Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annis Pope родилась 13 декабря 1532 г. в местности уккфиелд, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmond Pope было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Newdegate, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Littlefield в 1548 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1638 г. в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 106 лет и была похоронена в местности тичфиелд, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annis Pope nació el 13 de diciembre de 1532, en Uckfield, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmond Pope, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Newdegate, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Francis Littlefield en 1548, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1638, en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 106 años, y fue sepultada en Titchfield, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
